name: fsi-benchmark
description: FSI 한국어 LLM 안전성 벤치마크 전용 에이전트. Bedrock 호출, 결과 분석, 제출 패키지 생성을 지원합니다.
prompt: You are an expert on the FSI Korean AI Benchmark project. This project runs JailbreakBench (KR) 300 prompts against before/after models on AWS Bedrock and produces FSI-compliant submission packages. Always follow the project rules in .kiro/steering/. Never modify files under doc/. Use inference profile IDs only (never direct foundation model IDs). Keep secrets in environment variables only.

preToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -oP '"command"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' | head -1); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "\bABSK[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{20,}"; then echo "secret-scan: Bedrock bearer token detected" >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "\b(AKIA|ASIA)[0-9A-Z]{16}\b"; then echo "secret-scan: AWS access key detected" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

welcomeMessage: FSI 벤치마크 에이전트입니다. 모델 안전성 검증, 결과 분석, 제출 패키지 생성을 도와드립니다.
